issue_body_preview:
Dialog's close button don't close dialog. However accept and cancle buttons in footer are working.

Extra: Footer button(Accept & cancel) dont have enough space.
Solution: Give Footer `padding: 10px` just like `.vs-dialog-text` so footer looks cleaner. I didn't check how close button works. So no
test_description_zh: 打开一个带有关闭图标的 Dialog 对话框，点击对话框右上角的关闭图标（X 按钮），观察对话框是否正常关闭。同时观察对话框底部（Footer）中接受和取消按钮的间距和排版。
expected_result_zh: 点击对话框右上角的关闭图标后，对话框应正常关闭并消失。底部的接受和取消按钮应有足够的内边距，排版整洁美观。
